message: DrukPass project kickoff — Chief of Product taking the helm
Product narrative written — 3 ICPs, 3 Wow Moments, acquisition story
Team assembly — reading scope router, assessing DrukPass brief
LARGE TRACK / ENTERPRISE mode. Full 22-agent roster assembling.
ICP profiling — 3 user types, forming hypotheses about their real pain
3 ICP profiles + empathy maps + cross-ICP journey map. Killer insight: guide permit wallet = word-of-mouth vector
PRD authoring — translating ICP pain into MVP scope with measurable KPIs
PRD complete — 5 epics, 22 stories, sprint plan mapped to Omdena structure, success criteria defined
UC-1: Reviewing PRD and ICP research before architecture begins
UC-1 approved — beginning system architecture + data model for DrukPass
LangGraph orchestration chain complete — 4 agents wired, fallback mode, audit events on every node
Building FastAPI application — routes, auth, booking endpoints
SWARM launched — backend API + frontend dashboards building in parallel. MESH topology.
README complete — Quick Start, architecture diagram, API reference, agent chain docs. Judge-ready.
Tests complete — 32 test cases covering eligibility, SDF, permit, full chain. All edge cases covered.
Security review — threat model, RBAC audit, PII handling
